programme.title: Hotel Transylvania (2012)
programme.desc: Dracula opens a luxury resort for monsters, to provide a refuge from terrified humans. His cosy sanctuary is disrupted when a normal man unwittingly checks in, and the situation is complicated when the unwanted guest takes a liking to the count's daughter. Animated comedy, with the voices of Adam Sandler and Andy Samberg

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania 2 (2015)
programme.desc: Dracula is worried that his half-human grandson is not showing any vampiric tendencies, so enlists the help of his fellow monsters in showing the youngster how it is done. The count is shocked to receive an unwelcome visit from his own father, who does not approve of his son's tolerance of humans. Animated comedy, with the voices of Adam Sandler and Andy Samberg

programme.title: Red Bull Soapbox Race: London's Greatest Moments
programme.desc: A look at some of the teams of the friends, families and workmates who came together to design, build and race gravity powered soapboxes down the hills of London's Alexandra Palace

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade is joined by actor Jon Hamm, star of Mad Men and Baby Driver, for a yuletide trek around Hong Kong - the most visited and most vertical city on the planet. They join the other 26.7 million tourists, as they gorge themselves on questionable foodstuffs, traditional transportation and the world's largest seated Buddha statue. After resting at the Peninsula Hotel for some colonial opulence, they sample street food and get their fortunes read, before taking to the air for a bird's eye view by helicopter

programme.title: QI XL
programme.desc: Sandi Toksvig hosts the quiz with a difference, in which the questions are so difficult points are awarded for the answers she finds most interesting. programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: The Alvarados take a gamble and Tarrell 'T-Money' Wright lands an interesting item. Plus, Brandon Bernier hopes to make an impact on the bidding for several storage units

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The Virginia blitz strategy reaches a crucial point, Mike and Frank meet a motorcycle legend ready to clear out his stock, and a VIP pass to a unique man cave turns up a rare item

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The guys find themselves in dangerous territory when they pick the collection of a Harley enthusiast. Plus, Dave unveils Mike's biggest-ever investment

programme.desc: The amateur race arrives into Valkenburg aan de Geul in the Netherlands, traditionally the finish of the Amstel Gold Classic cycling race

programme.desc: A look at some of the teams of the friends, families and workmates who came together to design, build and race gravity powered soapboxes down the hills of London's Alexandra Palace

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: The chef embarks on a series of extended culinary breaks, visiting markets, restaurants, wineries, cafes and bars, looking for food excellence and also some innovative recipes that will encourage viewers to cook at home. He begins his first adventure in autumnal Bordeaux, where he helps judge a local wine contest and hires a 2CV for an excursion to the coast - abundant with mussels and oysters. At home, he cooks a memorable dish of steak frites with Bordelaise sauce

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May buy second-hand lorries and set about discovering how difficult it is to become an HGV driver. The Porsche 911 and Lamborghini Gallardo are put to the test, and Michael Parkinson is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May travel to America to take a road trip from San Francisco to the heart of Utah in three new-generation muscle cars, hoping this time to avoid a pelting with rocks by a mob of angry locals. Back in the UK, the Fiat 500 Abarth gets a test-drive and Will Young is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Greg Davies sets Aisling Bea, Bob Mortimer, Mark Watson, Nish Kumar and Sally Phillips brilliantly bewildering tasks, including basketball without hands

programme.title: Room 101
programme.desc: Broadcaster and former MP Gyles Brandreth, comedian and presenter Adam Hills and singer Melanie C - the woman who will forever be known as Sporty Spice - compete to have their pet hates banished to the infamous room. programme.title: Room 101
programme.desc: Interior designer Laurence Llewelyn-Bowen, actor Charles Dance (Game of Thrones) and comedienne and actress Andi Osho compete to have their pet hates banished to the infamous room. Frank Skinner hosts the light-hearted panel show

programme.desc: Sandi Toksvig hosts the high-brow quiz, asking questions about ruffs, red items and other things beginning with the letter R. Trying to come up with the answers are Alan Davies, Tom Allen, Susan Calman and Zoe Lyons

programme.title: The Misadventures of Romesh Ranganathan
programme.desc: The comedian visits countries that are rarely visited by tourists to get a sense of the local culture and find out if they deserve their reputation. His first destination is Haiti, a country mostly famous for a dictatorship and a series of natural disasters. Accompanied by journalist Jeremy Dupin, he visits the iron market, attends vodou ceremonies, and explores a cathedral destroyed by an earthquake

programme.title: Rhod Gilbert's Work Experience
programme.desc: The comedian steps out of the spotlight to learn another trade, trying his hand at the distinctly glamourless profession of farming - and his introduction to the job sees him mucking out the cows

programme.title: Drug Wars
programme.desc: The police in Manila begin a new tactic where they lure dealers and traffickers right into their hands, with informants setting the bait before the cops move in for the bust

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: A multi-billion-pound 32km super sewer under the streets of London, an early sewer system at the Palace of Knossos and a pivotal piece of tunnel boring equipment from the past

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: A vast new island in the seas off Dubai, which has been created to house the world's biggest observation wheel - twice the size of the London Eye

programme.title: Thailand: Earth's Tropical Paradise
programme.desc: Exploring the wildlife and culture of the Southeast Asian nation. The first episode examines the south of the country, a popular tourist destination for Westerners, and examines the role of spirituality in daily life. Narrated by Sophie Okonedo

programme.title: Thailand: Earth's Tropical Paradise
programme.desc: In central Thailand's forests, fertile plains and even its city streets, nature finds a way of living alongside people, and spirituality can be found in human and animal relationships, both likely and unlikely. This bustling region is known as the nation's rice bowl - but even here, there are magical places to be found. Narrated by Sophie Okonedo

programme.title: Thailand: Earth's Tropical Paradise
programme.desc: The mountains and forests of Northern Thailand, an area that is home to a variety of wildlife, leading to unusual partnerships developing between animals and people. Narrated by Sophie Okonedo

programme.title: India's New Worlds
programme.desc: Part one of two. Documentary charting wildlife conservation projects in India, including efforts to avert the extinction of the Asiatic lion

programme.title: India's New Worlds
programme.desc: Concluding part of the documentary charting some of the many wildlife conservation projects currently being pursued in India

programme.title: Planet Earth II
programme.desc: Rare footage of the elusive animals that live in the unforgiving environment of the world's mountain ranges. A female snow leopard with a cub ends up caught between two rival males, grizzly bears rub themselves up against trees in an attempt to shed their winter fur, and golden eagles hunt over snow-capped peaks

programme.title: Planet Earth II
programme.desc: Footage of plants and animals that live in jungles, one of the hardest environments to thrive in, including strange fungi and creatures that glow in the dark which have never been captured on film before. The programme also includes recordings of caimans and the jaguars that prey on them, freshwater dolphins that swim through flooded forests, undergrowth-dwelling frogs that have to defend themselves against wasps, and the Indri, the world's largest living lemur, which inhabits the forests of Madagascar

programme.title: Planet Earth II
programme.desc: Footage of animals that live in the desert, including a pride of desert lions that risks hunting a giraffe several times their size. The film also features an immense swarm of locusts, sand grouse flying for 120 miles to gather water for their offspring, and an unprecedented recording of a tiny bat defending itself against one of the world's deadliest scorpions

programme.title: Planet Earth II
programme.desc: Wildlife that inhabit the world's grasslands, areas that are struck by some of the most dramatic seasonal changes seen in the world. The programme features footage of Brazil's giant anteaters and Asian saiga antelope, as well as lions engaging in ferocious battles with buffalo in the flooded Okavango, bee-eaters taking advantage of elephants to help them catch insects, and caribou embarking on migrations across the freezing northern tundra, stalked every step of the way by predatory Arctic wolves

programme.title: Planet Earth II
programme.desc: Footage of wild animals that have made a home in cities, including leopards on the streets of Mumbai, peregrine falcons hunting among New York's skyscrapers, hyenas that live peacefully alongside the people of Harar, macaques in Jaipur, and langurs in Jodhpur, which are regarded as having great religious significance by the citizens. The programme also examines how some animals are struggling to survive in urban environments, and questions how cities can be built to serve their needs as well as those of the human inhabitants

programme.title: Great Continental Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Armed with his 1913 railway guide, Michael Portillo travels through Italy from Turin to Venice.Along the way, he recreates a scene from the Michael Caine film The Italian Job on a Fiat test track and takes a trip in a seaplane to investigate the early 20th-century British love affair with Lake Como. In Verona, he visits the house used to attract Edwardian tourists to the alleged setting of Shakespeare's Romeo and Juliet and finds a microcosm of pre-First World War Europe at the Venice Biennale art exhibition

programme.title: Great Continental Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo travels through Germany, learning about an Edwardian fitness craze in Dresden before heading to Leipzig on a historic line built by British engineers in 1839. He discovers model-railway making on the grandest of scales in Hamburg and ends his journey in Kiel, where he reveals how British yachtsmen spied on the German navy in the early 20th century

programme.title: 'Allo 'Allo!
programme.desc: Helga tells Von Strohm that the stolen money was forged, so he thinks up a plan to get rid of the cash, while Michelle and Crabtree hatch a plot to get the airmen back to England

programme.title: 'Allo 'Allo!
programme.desc: Herr Flick arrests Leclerc and issues a proclamation he'll be shot if the stolen Gestapo money is not returned, while Edith is in a romantic mood and Fanny decides to bake a potato

programme.title: 'Allo 'Allo!
programme.desc: Rene narrowly escapes 258 exploding Christmas puddings and quickly becomes embroiled in another daring plot proposed by Michelle and the Resistance

programme.title: 'Allo 'Allo!
programme.desc: Rene and the resistance attempt to smuggle the airmen back to England inside empty landmines, but Herr Flick and Von Smallhausen hide in the mines awaiting resistance members

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Dave goes to Wales to bag a Sierra Cosworth, a sought-after car in the bidding market. Dad Derek gets his hands on a more sedate 1926 Standard Tourer - a quirky little motor

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: A Cold War Soviet classic goes under the hammer. Built like a tank, the Moskovitch gets few admirers for style, but finds a loving home with a fan of Eastern Bloc classics

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek collects a Jaguar Mark 2 and explains why they made such poor getaway cars for 1960s bank robbers. A customer considers a Morris Marina as a Christmas present for his wife

programme.title: Viking Dead
programme.desc: Experts analyse the remains of two Viking boats, that were filled with dead bodies

programme.title: Viking Dead
programme.desc: How a well-preserved Viking ship discovered in 1904 continues to present archaeologists with new mysteries to unravel

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: The construction of Whistler on the Canadian Pacific seaboard, a remote mountain town whose creation was made possible with record-breaking engineering equipment, helping establish one of the best ski resorts in the world

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: Nato's Airborne Warning and Control System, known as Awac, a cutting-edge aircraft with a huge radar dome mounted on its roof that enables pilots to spot hostile intrusion as they protect state borders of the countries in the Nato alliance. One of the most complex surveillance aircrafts in the world, it is able to seek out, locate, and defend against threats - no matter how fast moving or well hidden

The programme also examines how some animals are struggling to survive in urban environments, and questions how cities can be built to serve their needs as well as those of the human inhabitants

programme.title: Wild France
programme.desc: Part one of two. Documentary exploring thousands of years of history, landscape and nature in France, as well as thriving wildlife from the Alps to the Pyrenees, as well as venturing from the mainland to Corsica

programme.title: Wild France
programme.desc: Part two of two. The unique ecosystem of the Marais Poitevin, where seawater and freshwater come together. Dragonfly larvae gestate in the region's waters, and swim to the surface and fly away once their development is over

programme.title: Great Continental Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo explores Scandinavia, braving one of the world's oldest rollercoasters in Copenhagen's Tivoli Gardens. He then crosses the Oresund Bridge linking Denmark to Sweden, retracing the journey of a train that carried a revolutionary Russian passenger on an epic voyage, before test-driving a vintage Volvo in Gothenburg. Crossing into Norway, Michael discovers how in 1913 the nation expressed its distinctively modern identity in plays, paintings and polar exploration

programme.title: Great Continental Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo travels through Bohemia and Bavaria, beginning by exploring the art nouveau architecture of Czech Republic capital Prague. He then samples the sulphurous spa waters and wallows in peat and mud in Marianske Lazne, formerly known as Marienbad, before test driving a state-of-the-art passenger train made at the Skoda factory in Pilsen. Crossing the border into Germany, Michael encounters a fire-breathing dragon in Furth-im-Wald, and learns about an early 20th-century pioneer who laid the foundations for Munich's pre-eminence in science and technology

programme.title: Great Continental Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo sets out to sample the delights of the Atlantic coasts of Spain and France, beginning in Bordeaux, where he uncovers a historic British connection to the region's wines. Across the border in San Sebastian, Michael learns how diplomacy brought Britain and Spain closer together and rides on a hair-raising scenic railway. Heading to Bilbao, he explores the industrial ties between France and Spain and learns to cook a traditional Basque dish

programme.title: Living With Hitler
programme.desc: Life on the Homefront and abroad is examined: from rationing and bereavement, the Allied bombing campaign, the Holocaust and finally, the fall of the Third Reich

programme.title: War Factories
programme.desc: The sabotaging efforts of Peugeot in Nazi-occupied France, where the bosses and workers cooperated closely with the Resistance to hinder the use of military vehicles by the Nazis

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: The Nazi occupation of Holland, which began relatively peacefully with Dutch civil servants continuing to run their own country, but eventually resulted in many thousands of deaths through the attempted elimination of Jewish citizens and starvation of the non-Jewish inhabitants. Narrated by Laurence Olivier

programme.title: Open All Hours
programme.desc: Roy Clarke's comedy, starring Ronnie Barker and David Jason. Tight-fisted shopkeeper Arkwright purchases fire-damaged stock, only to find all the tins have lost their labels

programme.title: Open All Hours
programme.desc: Granville tries to persuade Arkwright to buy a van, as he is fed up with having to struggle doing the rounds with the shop's outdated delivery bike. He is pleasantly surprised when his skinflint uncle agrees - until he takes the vehicle out on the road. Comedy, starring Ronnie Barker and David Jason

programme.title: Open All Hours
programme.desc: Arkwright feels neglected by Nurse Gladys Emmanuel, and decides to feign an illness in an attempt to get her undivided attention, but she soon sees through the ruse

programme.title: Viking Dead
programme.desc: The remains of a fleet of Viking boats, and the modern historians attempting to recreate them

programme.title: Viking Dead
programme.desc: A look at the discovery of various sites where Vikings had buried treasure, examining why they did it and where the loot came from originally

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: A floating bridge in Seattle, one of the longest such structures in the world, intended to connect the growing suburb of Bellevue with the high-tech downtown heart of the city. Plus, Albert Zwueste is on the Dutch Caribbean island of Curacao exploring one of the world's oldest surviving floating bridges, which helped inspire and inform the Seattle project

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: Maritime engineering in recent years has seen ever bigger ships and sea-based platforms constructed. On occasion, they may need moving, which is the purpose of the Boka Vanguard, the planet's largest heavy lift ship, capable of sinking itself, floating under its cargo and then lifting it up to be moved anywhere on the planet with sea. This extraordinary work of engineering is capable of carrying the Eiffel Tower and the Statue of Liberty at the same time

programme.title: Murder Maps
programme.desc: Part one of two. A re-examination of Jack the Ripper's crimes, revealing how the story known today was shaped by the sensationalist press of 1888. This documentary strips back decades of rumour and misinformation to reveal the true lives of the five women slain

programme.title: The Day When
programme.desc: Charles De Gaulle's refusal to surrender to the German invasion of France in 1940, and his subsequent escape to London and establishment of a French government in exile

programme.title: The Day When
programme.desc: Pivotal moments in history recreated using archive materials and dramatic reconstructions, beginning with Churchill persuading the British government to go to war

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: In Dorset, Michael Portillo visits Brownsea Island, where Robert Baden Powell began the scout movement in the early 20th century. Joining a group of present scouts, the presenter learns to build a bivouac and finds out what it is about scouting that still appeals to boys - and girls - today. In the New Forest, Michael searches out some unsung heroes of the First World War - the ponies who became war horses - and hears their story from a commoner who runs a stable and riding school. Then in Bournemouth, the one-time MP investigates a very British institution - the beach hut

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys

Lennox Cato values a box that may have belonged to William Shakespeare's wife, and a collection of rare figures and dolls turns out to be a find of national importance

Drawn by rich culture and history, they're after a home in the Manche area. Laura Hamilton shows them five properties for their £140,000 budget

programme.title: The Windsors: Inside the Royal Dynasty
programme.desc: This episodem focuses on the early days of Elizabeth II's reign. The young queen takes her first steps as Queen, but finds herself torn between old tradition and those, like her husband, who want to modernise the monarchy

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: The architect meets a 17-year-old builder who has transformed a narrowboat into a floating holiday home, and a bride-to-be who has bought a disused burger van with the intention of turning it into a mobile bar for her wedding reception. George's Spanish tour continues with a visit to a snail-shaped house in the mountain valleys of Aragon

programme.title: 24 Hours in Police Custody
programme.desc: The police investigate an apparently unprovoked attack that has left a man fighting for his life after being shot in the chest at point blank range by a complete stranger. As Bedfordshire Police's Guns & Gangs unit comes under increasing pressure to catch the shooter before he strikes again, a woman arrives at Luton police station to report being threatened by a man who matches the description

programme.title: Queen Elizabeth and the Spy in the Palace
programme.desc: The story of Anthony Blunt, royal appointed art expert and KGB spy, who worked as Surveyor of the Queen's Pictures for 27 years. The programme examines how he was previously employed by George VI to loot art treasures from Germany in the aftermath of the Second World War, and that despite Blunt's protestations of loyalty to the monarchy, classified documents have since revealed that he provided damaging information about the royal family to his Soviet employers

programme.title: The Queen's Lost Family
programme.desc: Prince George makes a love match and marries the glamorous Princess Marina of Greece and Denmark, while Henry gives up the married Beryl Markham and also makes a suitable marriage. Edward, meanwhile, brings married American divorcee Wallis Simpson to George and Marina's pre-wedding party at Buckingham Palace, scandalising his parents. Not long after George V's Silver Jubilee celebrations, a unifying event for the nation, the King dies and Edward inherits the throne

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: This edition follows the stories of people who have lived through tragedy and life-changing circumstances, exploring how they've overcome their loss and adapted to the new paths their lives have taken. Steve, 52, is rushed to St George's after falling over and hitting his head on a concrete step, while 21-year-old Fleur is assessed after she woke up with pain and swelling in her leg. Muffy, 72, is brought to Resus with slurred speech and weakness in her legs, and doctors suspect she may have suffered a stroke

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Noel Fitzpatrick treats Koa, a six-month-old Bouvier des Flandres who is suffering from a badly deformed back leg, causing huge pain. Patricia brings her beloved 11-year-old Rhodesian ridgeback, Kwanda, to Fitzpatrick's Guildford hospital with an eye infection that she fears may be the sign of something more sinister. Dr Laurent Findji confirms it is bad news - a malignant tumour

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is cast in the title role of Everyman, a superhero movie penned by Comic Book Guy, but struggles with the exercise and diet regimen required to get in shape for the part. With the guest voice of Seth Rogen

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer look back at two shows featuring families who needed to reconfigure their ground-floor layouts. Graham and Nardeth bought their detached Windsor home 10 years ago, but while he loves Windsor and sees it as their dream home, she is tired of the cramped interior. Enter Kirstie, knocking down walls in the hope of proving the house was worth keeping. Plus, Northamptonshire couple Louis and Isobel are desperate to enjoy their retirement - but it will take a £70,000 refurbishment to reconfigure the ground floor. Even then, will they decide to stay or sell up?

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The week's first visit is to Carly Cornwall's Juniperlea Inn in Midlothian, where the roadside location causes sleepless nights and one guest announces that they would not return

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: The heat causes havoc with the floor in a French B&B, one ex-pat may have become the victim of his own success, and there is good news for a new restaurant in Almeria, Spain

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jonnie Irwin meets holistic therapist Daniela from East Yorkshire, who is looking to find a property on the coastline of western Madeira to live with her two rescue dogs. She wants a property with sea views, lots of outside space and the potential for a therapy room. With Daniela's budget of £100,000 and her mother Janet by her side to help, Jonnie Irwin lines up five options for her to choose between

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Jonnie Irwin advises Jacky and Peter Kennett how far their £150,000 budget will stretch in the Tampa Bay area of Florida in the United States. Having visited the area for many a holiday, they have their eyes on an attractive home in which to spend the winter

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Sara Damergi helps George and Gillian Pook search for a holiday home and a property they can eventually retire to on Costa Rica's Caribbean coast, and shows them places she hopes will be suitable within their £100,000 budget

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The competition heads to Manchester, where battling it out for the £1,000 cash prize are part-time DJ Dom, 35-year old barber Danny, trainee barrister Sasha, nurse Katherine and goth Maria. In the first edition, DJ Dom kicks off the week serving up a menu inspired by the 1990s 'Madchester' music scene

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Trainee barrister Sasha hosts the second night in Manchester, where she hopes to impress her guests with a Chinese-Pakistani fusion menu. Meanwhile, fellow contestant Maria reveals more about her love of gothic culture, and Danny discusses his soon-to-be-written autobiography

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Nurse Katherine hosts the third dinner party in Manchester, and she opts for a simple menu of a smoked salmon with horseradish cream starter, and a chorizo and chickpea main course. At the table, direct questioning and some extraordinary revelations cause some of the guests to feel uncomfortable

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Barber Danny hosts the fourth night of the competition in Manchester, and decides on an evening of Bulgarian cuisine as a homage to his wife. His party ends with some Bulgarian language lessons that bemuse fellow diners Dom and Maria

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: It is the final night in Manchester and glamorous goth Maria is hoping to wow her guests with her twist on Asian cuisine. Some of the guests are feeling a little uneasy that the host will impart her love of vampire culture upon her menu, but the blood-free dishes even manage to impress daddy's girl Sasha. However, an avant-garde transgender dancer creates a stir, and at one point it seems possible that Maria has bitten off more than she can chew

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits some of the restaurants that he set out to save, including The Mixing Bowl, The Olde Stone Mill, Peter's and Campania. Have their owners pulled themselves out of their nightmares?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Hannah, with the help of her friend Helen, is looking for a modern, two-bed apartment with a sea view on the stunning south-west coast of Majorca. But with properties in high demand, can Jasmine Harman find Hannah her dream home for her budget of £250,000?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jane and Martin want a holiday home in the town of Portimão in the Algarve - but Ben Hillman needs to find properties suitable not only for the couple but their beloved dog Bailey

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien head to Tiverton in the West Country to meet petrolhead Roger. Henry finds part of a tornado jet that he wants to turn into a table, while Simon finds a pair of exhaust pipes, which he thinks could become a trendy pair of lamps

programme.title: The Dog House
programme.desc: An 11-year-old is thrilled to meet his dream dog - Gizmo the pug. However, Wood Green staff are worried his excitement might send breathless Gizmo into a panic. After the loss of her previous dog, Charley is wondering if she can love again and considers whether young lurcher Sonia can fill the void. Plus, ever-optimistic Jack Russell Rocco is matched with the adventurous Job family, who are looking a dog who can keep up with them

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, as cameras capture their instant reactions prompted by the week's biggest and best shows, be they entertainment juggernauts, hard-hitting documentaries, news reports or gritty dramas

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, as cameras capture their instant reactions prompted by the week's biggest and best shows, be they entertainment juggernauts, hard-hitting documentaries, news reports or gritty dramas

programme.title: 24 Hours in Police Custody
programme.desc: DCI Adam Gallop believes a man declared missing in 2015 has been murdered - but has so far been unable to locate his body, and the more time passes, the less chance there is of new witnesses or forensic evidence turning up. The police investigation takes officers from an urgent excavation in the woods where the missing man is believeds to have been shot to a journey across Europe in search of clues

programme.title: 24 Hours in Police Custody
programme.desc: The police investigate an apparently unprovoked attack that has left a man fighting for his life after being shot in the chest at point blank range by a complete stranger. As Bedfordshire Police's Guns & Gangs unit comes under increasing pressure to catch the shooter before he strikes again, a woman arrives at Luton police station to report being threatened by a man who matches the description

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up to Cancer
programme.desc: Matt Lucas hosts as TV presenter Stacey Dooley, Little Mix's Jade Thirlwall, comedian Katherine Ryan and internet influencer KSI show off their baking skills. They serve up cocktail-flavoured fondant fancies, have their knowledge of pastry tested in the technical and in the showstopper are asked to create a scene showing something they cannot live without - all from biscuit and meringue. Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith judge their efforts

programme.title: Scotland's Scenic Railways
programme.desc: A historic section of the East Fife coastal railway is prepared for reopening in a celebration of the golden age of steam. However, the presence of beavers living beneath the line threatens to cause disastrous flooding. Trainee conductor Melanie attempts to join the ranks of Scotland's train crew, and the piper and dancers of the Atholl Highlanders perform a tartan takeover at King's Cross station

programme.title: Grayson's Art Club
programme.desc: Grayson and Philippa Perry welcome illusionist Derren Brown, who talks about his love of painting. Comedian Alex Horne creates a unique response to the theme of the week - travel. Art Club meets Liverpudlian artist Chila Kumari Singh Burman, whose recent installation transformed the front of Tate Britain into a celebration of bright lights and swirling colour. Grayson and Derren choose their favourite artworks from this week's submissions and some of the special guests from throughout the series return for a heart-warming finale

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The rivals arrive at Starshinezzz in County Durham, where laid-back host Dave Taylor hopes his renowned hospitality will make him a winner

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: Summer nears to an end as in Valencia, a couple try pushing their bike business to the next level. Elsewhere, the expat owners of a B&B end their season busier than ever, and two former teachers take on their biggest booking yet

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Recently retired Baksho wants to buy a holiday home in the resort of Gran Alacant on Spain's popular Costa Blanca. With a budget of £100,000 and her sister Sukvinder by her side to help, Jasmine Harman sets out to find Baksho the perfect family friendly property

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Jonnie Irwin helps Rob and Jan Porter search for a property in Sarasota Bay on Florida's Gulf Coast. The couple have a £120,000 budget for a two-bedroom holiday home where they can escape the rainy winters of north-west England

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Entrepreneur and sports fishing enthusiast Ian Walls from Edinburgh has decided to expand his property portfolio by purchasing a place on Grand Bahama where he can spend a couple of months every winter. With his US-based girlfriend Lisa on hand to offer a second opinion, Sara Damergi shows them a selection of homes for sale around his £111,000 budget

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Five people from Swindon take turns trying to throw the perfect dinner party. International DJ Mark Eteson hosts the first night and hopes his Ibiza-style menu featuring Bora Bora Beach brownies, paella and fishcakes will be a hit, before challenging his guests to a rave-off which he will judge himself

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Amateur dramatics enthusiast Michaela Kearns hosts the second party in Swindon, but admits she is not much of a cook. She hopes to dazzle her guests with a glamour-filled evening featuring melted chocolate with dipping treats, but anticipates she might not be able to persuade her fellow diners to take part in her planned show tune performance - complete with a full band

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Financial advisor Scott Hillier hosts Swindon's third party, hoping to impress his guests with a Wild West-themed evening. Tensions run high as Gill Bright awkwardly apologises to last night's host Michaela Kearns and Scott Hillier hopes to smooth things over by performing a rap

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Direct sales manager Sally Rachael hosts the fourth dinner party in Swindon, featuring a 'girls' night in' theme with mysteriously titled dishes and a quirky dress code that leaves her guests clueless and unhappy

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Alternative therapist Gill Bright hosts the final dinner party in Swindon and has plans for an 'upstairs downstairs' Edwardian-themed evening with sophisticated food followed by some circle dancing to Bob Marley

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef again comes to the aid of failing American restaurants, starting in Fishtown, Philadelphia, where he tries to help the three owners of the Hot Potato Cafe, which has not made a profit in two years. Spurred on by a scathing review by an influential critic, he makes radical changes to alter the staff's attitudes and create food that is up to his own exacting standards

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Postal workers Linda and Andy from Leicestershire are hanging up their mailbags to relocate to the sun-kissed coast of western Cyprus. Jonnie Irwin has five options lined up for their £120,000 budget, but will any have the couple ready to put in an offer?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Kelly from Essex would love a holiday home in the Black Sea coastal resort of Sunny Beach in Bulgaria. She's looking for an apartment on a complex, with plenty of facilities and a pool. With a budget of £25,000 and Kelly's best friend Angie coming along to help, will any of Scarlette Douglas's five fantastic properties turn out to be the perfect package?

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: The architect meets a Yorkshire couple who plan to transform a goods wagon into a summerhouse and gin bar, and visits a narrowboat conversion in Buckinghamshire. George's Spanish tour reaches Madrid, where he meets a man who has spent the past 50 years building a cathedral by hand. Plus, work continues on the expandable caravan pod

programme.title: The Queen's Lost Family
programme.desc: Prince George makes a love match and marries the glamorous Princess Marina of Greece and Denmark, while Henry gives up the married Beryl Markham and also makes a suitable marriage. Edward, meanwhile, brings married American divorcee Wallis Simpson to George and Marina's pre-wedding party at Buckingham Palace, scandalising his parents. Not long after George V's Silver Jubilee celebrations, a unifying event for the nation, the King dies and Edward inherits the throne

programme.title: 24 Hours in Police Custody
programme.desc: DCI Adam Gallop believes a man declared missing in 2015 has been murdered - but has so far been unable to locate his body, and the more time passes, the less chance there is of new witnesses or forensic evidence turning up. The police investigation takes officers from an urgent excavation in the woods where the missing man is believeds to have been shot to a journey across Europe in search of clues

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, as cameras capture their instant reactions prompted by the week's biggest and best shows, be they entertainment juggernauts, hard-hitting documentaries, news reports or gritty dramas

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up to Cancer
programme.desc: Matt Lucas welcomes TV presenter Anneka Rice, comedian John Bishop, pop star Nadine Coyle and wheelchair basketball player-turned-presenter Ade Adepitan into the tent. Under the watchful eye of judges Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith, the celebrity bakers attempt decorative choux buns in the signature and tackle financiers in the technical before making a showstopping cake that represents something from their bucket list

programme.title: Snackmasters
programme.desc: Fred Sirieix challenges two leading chefs to tackle KFC's Zinger Burger and replicate their original top-secret chicken recipe. Tom Aikens from Muse in Belgravia and Alex Bond from Nottingham's Alchemilla have just seven days to perfect their recipes, before cooking them head to head for KFC's big bosses, who will choose a winner. As the chefs take different but equally outlandish approaches in their quests for a perfect replica, comedian Jayde Adams goes behind the scenes of KFC's factories to reveal how the famous products are really made

programme.title: First Dates Hotel
programme.desc: Six-foot gym owner and ex-military man Richard is paired with Emilia. Despite his muscular appearance, he is a sensitive soul who loves musicals and Harry Potter, and his Asperger's leaves him unable to read what others are thinking, so mid-date he is forced to ask Emilia how he is doing. Meanwhile, 40-year-old hotelier Andy arrives at Vesuvius for his first ever date with a man, 37-year-old bouncer Joseph, and police officer Angie hooks up with car salesman Tom, who is determined to leave his stereotypical lad image behind

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud meets Harry and Briony Anscombe, who have decided to move from London to Cornwall with their three young children and begin building work on an ambitious house, inspired by American modernist properties. With a budget of just £400,000, Harry opts to project manage himself, paying local builders by the hour, but his lack of experience in construction proves to be problematic

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: The team hits the road to sample some of the UK's finest dishes. Andi Oliver samples some Pimm's, and Jimmy Doherty examines the growing popularity of Caribbean jerk seasoning, and the qualities of different cooking apples. Kate Quilton meets a porridge-making champion, and Matt Tebbutt heads to the island of Orkney to discover the perfect vinegar for fish and chips

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Entertainment News on 5
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: Rich Kids, Skint Holiday
programme.desc: Luxury-loving Hattie is less than ecstatic to be heading off on a wild adventure holiday with Bear Grylls enthusiast Pete, his partner Louise and their two girls

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Documentary about the horrors of the rental market including a landlord who decided to sell his east London flat so he could afford a property with his girlfriend. But when he told his tenant, things quickly turned sour and the man stopped paying rent and refused to leave. Plus, the story of a pub owner in Lincolnshire trying to evict his tenant, having rented it 10 years ago on a 'gentleman's handshake'. Now, however, he is owed a staggering £40,000 in unpaid rent

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: In north London, Harrow council officers investigate an overcrowded property. An inspection uncovers many issues, including an unauthorised loft conversion that is a danger to the tenants who sleep there. A couple in Suffolk agree to rent a property to its former owner, who now refuses to leave, and a single mum tricks her way into a Milton Keynes property, confirming she has paid the deposit having done no such thing

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Housing officers in Harrow receive a tip-off about an overcrowded property and when they arrive they find 10 people living in dire conditions and a house that needs extensive emergency work. Squatters in Tottenham invade an elderly woman's home while she is away, ransacking the property and refusing to leave. In Waltham Abbey a seemingly perfect tenant forges her way into a desperate landlord's home, forcing him to move in with his parents while he struggles to evict his unruly occupant

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: The documentary about landlord and tenancy issues catches up on some of the stories featured so far. Emmanuel reveals what happened after he returned from a year working abroad to find himself £24,000 in mortgage arrears and unable to get into his own property. Andy made a mistake when he rented out his north London home to someone he knew, only for his so-called friend to sublet the property, pocket the profits and pay Andy nothing. What has happened since?

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Documentary highlighting alarming tales from all sides of the buy-to-let system, drawing attention to stories of unruly tenants who refuse to pay their dues and rogue landlords who have failed to live up to their responsibilities. The series also turns the spotlight on dishonest letting agents who have taken advantage of their position of trust to profit at the expense of both property owners and their tenants

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: High Court Enforcement agents evict a large group of squatters barricaded into a disused nursery in London, and have to resort to smashing their way in as they refuse to leave. Meanwhile, agents in Bristol try to recover over £10,000 owed by a plumbing business to a supplier, and emotions run high when they attempt to evict a tenant who pleads her innocence in west London

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Stewart and Vic become party to a fractured family's school fee woes in Staffordshire and Del and Dael need to reclaim £3,500 after a rental van was returned badly damaged. Stewart and Elmor are in Warwickshire, where the members of a household blame their predicament on a scheming landlord whose subsequent arrival sparks a fierce reaction, while Iain helps Stewart remove a young mother from her Lancashire home

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: The agents try to recover more than £12,000 owed by a jeweller to one of his suppliers, but as the tension mounts, the debtor violently lashes out at one of the officers. Meanwhile, agents in London chase up more than £5,000 owed by a tenant to her former landlord for rent arrears, and also attempt to retrieve over £6,000 owed by a property developer

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: In Staffordshire, the agents chase up a £3,000 deposit owed by a landlord to his tenant, and officers in Birmingham try to recover £25,000 from a nightclub owner for unpaid solicitor fees. Meanwhile, agents Max and Paul are in Surrey as they attempt to collect more than £3,000 owed to a garage after a customer disputed the repairs made to his van

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: The officers try to recover £5,500 owed by a travel agent to a dissatisfied customer in east London, and in Birmingham the agents chase over £2,000 owed by a convenience store owner to a supplier. In Staffordshire, two officers try to collect several thousand pounds owed by a pensioner after a dispute with his neighbour went all the way to the High Court

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: Close friends Janet Perrie and Fiona Hope moved to the South Ayrshire village of Dipple in search of an idyllic new life for themselves and their 22 dogs. Unfortunately for them, other residents were enraged by the noise, smell and mess and wasted no time in contacting the authorities. In a cul-de-sac in Leicestershire, the Pollard, Walne and Elliott families have been harassed by 68-year-old Leslie Collins for more than a decade after they complained about the noise from an illegal wood-waste business he was running from his home. He then began to target them with increasingly intimidating behaviour - including mooning, two-finger salutes, shouting abuse, cutting holes in hedges and spying on them with binoculars

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: Documentary using eyewitness testimony and footage from camcorders, CCTV and phones to examine traumatic, shocking, humorous and occasionally bizarre feuds between neighbours. Including an Army veteran who was attacked with a knife, and a Polish couple forced to call the police after their neighbour threw petrol over one of them and threatened to burn down their conservatory

programme.title: Fifty Shades Darker (2017)
programme.desc: The bookish Anastasia Steele and damaged billionaire playboy Christian Grey continue their sado masochistic relationship, while their safety is threatened by strangers from his past. While Christian wrestles with his inner demons, Anastasia must confront the anger and envy of the women who came before her. Erotic drama sequel to Fifty Shades of Grey, starring Dakota Johnson, Jamie Dornan, Eric Johnson, Bella Heathcote and Rita Ora

programme.desc: A driver is trapped in his car after it careered out of control, smashing into a wall before flipping sideways onto a driveway. Dr Polly Haywood and critical care paramedic Sarah Folley are sent to the scene

programme.title: Rich Kids Go Skint
programme.desc: Six rich young adults swap their lavish lifestyles to go and live with families on the breadline. First up is Fergus from Chelsea, who left his posh bachelor pad to live with hard-working childcare worker Anna and her four children in Croydon. How will the University of Westminster graduate, who is used to having his lavish lifestyle paid for by his parents, survive on a tight budget?

programme.title: Filthy House SOS
programme.desc: In Solihull, cleaners Richard and Brennan help IT workers Divya and Kaushal, who just do not know how to clean. Over three days they help transform their home

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: An edition catching up with previous cases. Owed thousands in rent, landlord Matthew decided to evict his tenant, and called on an eviction specialist for help. As the tenant lived with seven cats, Matthew was worried about the state of the property, but that turned out to be the least of his problems. Cameras catch up with Matthew to see if he turned his property around. Having found a buyer for his house, Kirk asked the sitting tenant to leave. However, on the day of the move, she refused, stopped paying rent and Kirk's sale fell through. Kirk had to evict his nightmare tenant before he lost the house. Was he able to sell his property at least, or was he tempted to become a landlord once again?

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Ben Reeve from Lewisham Council's Rogue Landlord Unit aims to help Lola, who stopped paying rent 18 months earlier in an effort to get her negligent landlord to deal with her dilapidated flat's many problems. Eviction specialists also come to the aid of Amit, who found himself continuing his late father's battle with a nightmare renter, and 70-year-old landlady Joan, who started receiving unnerving threats from her rent-skipping tenant after she started legal proceedings to get him evicted

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Agents Max and Steve try to recover almost £2,000 owed by the owner of a bridal shop in London, while officers Gary and Cona in Kent chase over £4,000 of vet fees after two neighbouring dogs got into a fight. In south west London, agents try to collect almost £11,500 owed by a small business

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: The police interception unit attempt to stop a dangerous driver, resulting in multiple cars and a helicopter being called into action. Dog handler Duncan assists armed response officers in Leeds city centre in the early hours following reports of a man carrying a pistol, while in Wakefield, a repeat offender who has been caught drink driving in the past thinks he knows how to beat the system

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Dan and Tom have their hands full with a driver who is four times over the limit and still refuses to come quietly even when he's bundled into the back of the police car. Sophie and Adie stop a carload of lads at five in the morning and the driver is over the limit, but it's what's down his trousers that is more of a concern

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: A gang of burglars breaks into a house and takes the keys to luxury cars. After the thieves flee in three stolen vehicles, multiple teams hunt them down with the police chopper. The first burglar is caught after a lengthy pursuit of a stolen Mercedes, which he abandons before running straight into the path of waiting officers. Once the occupants of a second stolen Merc are apprehended by the chopper team, Ben and Warren go after the third vehicle - which they are stunned to witness burst into flames

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Agents Stewart and Elmor chase over £1,500 of unpaid parking fines in Manchester, while Matt and Garry have a job to reclaim £1,600 for a car hire company in the West Midlands. programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Dog handler Duncan and the firearms team find themselves in a tense stand-off with suspected drug dealers who could be armed, with German shepherd Tia sent in to search and discovering more than the unit bargained for. programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Officers go in pursuit of a driver who is so drunk that he can't even keep his car on the road and the chase ends with shocking results. programme.title: Police Interceptors

In Wakefield, dog handler Duncan and police dog Tia are in hot pursuit of a renegade van, while officers Nick and Bobo rush to a scene of total carnage after a drunk driver has crashed into a house

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!

programme.title: Britain's Parking Hell
programme.desc: In the Pembrokeshire town of Tenby, Welsh and English rugby fans seem more focused on kick-off time than parking, threatening to turn its roads into a ruck of cars. Meanwhile in Cardiff, a city with the dubious title of Britain's third-worst place to park, two carloads of parking desperadoes search for a space on match day. In Ivybridge, Devon, locals claim a ticket machine with a typo problem has resulted in an avalanche of unjust tickets and are determined to take their fight to the top

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera

programme.title: A&E After Dark
programme.desc: Hull Royal Infirmary staff have to deal with abusive patients disrupting care due to Covid restrictions preventing family members from entering the waiting room. After her motorcycle collided with a deer at 60mph, 56-year-old Tracy is rushed in, and consultant Dr Andy must establish why she is having trouble feeling her legs, while Adam is devastated when an accident in the gym means he may not be able to compete in Hull's strongest man contest

programme.title: 999: Critical Condition
programme.desc: A man is rushed in with multiple stab wounds to his abdomen and after the team check whether his organs have been affected, he is rushed in for emergency surgery. Meanwhile, a teenage footballer arrives by helicopter, having lost all sensation below the waist after an accident during a game, and a dairy farmer is wheeled into A&E, having being knocked unconscious by a cow's hoof. Worried about a bleed on the brain, staff fast-track him to CT, aware that any trauma to the brain could affect his ability to do his very physical job

programme.title: Scream 3 (2000)

As they try to determine the identity of the murderer, Sidney discovers a troubling link to her past, forcing her to confront her demons once and for all. Horror sequel, starring Neve Campbell, David Arquette and Courteney Cox

programme.title: Columbo: Murder - A Self Portrait (1989)
programme.desc: A possessive painter who fears his ex-wife will expose his dark secrets resorts to killing her, but makes it appear she drowned. However, Columbo is unconvinced and draws on his broad palette of experience to reveal the truth. Detective drama, starring Peter Falk, Patrick Bauchau and Fionnula Flanagan

programme.title: Columbo: Any Old Port in a Storm (1973)
programme.desc: A vineyard owner's financial security is jeopardised when his playboy younger brother threatens to sell the family winery. He resorts to killing his sibling and rigging the death scene to look like a scuba-diving accident. However, the crumpled cop sees through the ruse and in the process reveals he is something of a wine buff himself. Detective drama, with Peter Falk, Donald Pleasence and Julie Harris

programme.title: Columbo: Ashes to Ashes (1998)
programme.desc: The shabby sleuth investigates the complex case of a murdered Hollywood gossip writer. He uses his unique talents to interrogate a smooth-talking funeral director, who was once romantically involved with the victim and one of the last people to see her alive. Detective drama, with Peter Falk. Patrick McGoohan co-stars and directs

programme.title: Columbo Likes the Nightlife (2003)
programme.desc: The disheveled cop is drawn into the world of the Los Angeles club scene when he investigates the apparent suicide of a tabloid reporter, and uncovers evidence of a blackmail plot. Detective drama, with Peter Falk, Matthew Rhys and Jennifer Sky

programme.title: Columbo: Caution - Murder Can Be Hazardous to Your Health (1991)
programme.desc: The host of a TV show is threatened by a rival, who has discovered evidence of his murky past. The presenter does away with his blackmailer using poisoned cigarettes, and seems to have pulled off the perfect crime - but a certain shabby sleuth is soon on the case and finds a few things that fail to add up. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk and George Hamilton

programme.title: Columbo: A Trace of Murder (1997)
programme.desc: A conniving woman yearns to divorce her husband and set up home with her lover - but a pre-nuptial agreement means she stands to lose out. Instead, she devises a cunning plan to nullify the contract, framing her unsuspecting spouse for the murder of a business rival. However, she reckons without the shabby sleuth's unfailing ability to uncover the truth. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Shera Danese, Barry Corbin and David Rasche

programme.title: Columbo: An Exercise in Fatality (1974)
programme.desc: The owner of a chain of health clubs kills a business partner who was about to expose his crooked dealings. Making the death look like an unfortunate weightlifting accident, he cunningly creates the perfect alibi using a tape recording of his victim's voice - but he reckons without the intervention of the shabby sleuth. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Robert Conrad and Philip Bruns

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Carisi opens a police investigation when his niece reports a classmate for sexual assault, and Stone learns there are no perfect witnesses when it comes to sex crimes

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A girl's death becomes a criminal case when a surgeon harvests her organs without parental consent. Hard-hitting and emotional series chronicling the life and crimes of the New York Police Department, starring Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica is invited to the desert town of Gila Junction in Arizona by a friend who has come to suspect it is the site of a series of dangerous chemical experiments. Whodunit, starring Angela Lansbury and Dorothy Lyman

programme.title: NCIS

The victim is discovered to have come to America from Afghanistan and a necklace reveals a fingerprint that leads the team to a known assassin. Guest starring Lolita Davidovich

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The detectives investigate the case of a college professor pushed under a subway train - and the subsequent investigation leads to a man who had kidnapped his children and changed his identity 15 years earlier. Drama, starring Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A respected financial analyst dies from an overdose of Viagra, a drug he was advised not to take. The subsequent investigation uncovers foul play involving his mistress (guest star Julia Roberts) and an unscrupulous tycoon, whose attorneys thwart McCoy and Carmichael's attempts to prosecute. Drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Sam Waterston

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A hidden anti-Semitic message in a high-school yearbook offers an insight into the murder of an art teacher, and the subsequent case leads McCoy into conflict with 'Klan lawyer' Roy Payne

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green grow frustrated with their fruitless investigation of an elderly woman's murder and come to blows over suggestions that one of them is too old for the case. Crime drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A woman is found bludgeoned into a coma, the apparent victim of date-rape. Briscoe and Green track down an employee in the state controller's office who had been stalking her, and find the drug Demerol in his car. Guest starring Sebastian Roche

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A down-on-his-luck ad executive becomes a murder suspect when his wife and son are killed during a night he claims to have spent drinking. Ellen Pompeo (Grey's Anatomy) guest stars

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs is forced to take a step back from work when his increasingly frail father Jackson begs him to help track down an old friend from the Second World War who does not have long left to live. Meanwhile, the rest of the team investigate the death of a marine sergeant who appears to have been caught in the crossfire during a bungled robbery, but Tony and Tim find evidence the victim may have been targeted. Crime drama, guest starring Ralph Waite (The Waltons), with Mark Harmon

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Petty officer Jody Ray is killed by a hit-and-run driver and evidence points to staff sergeant Justin Dunne, whose guilt seems certain when DiNozzo and McGee find him washing a bloodstained knife when they go to arrest him. However, Dunne tells his lawyer Carrie Clark he was miles away in Falls Church at the time - stabbing bookmaker Donny Sullivan to death. Unable to reveal the truth to the NCIS team, Clark decides to check out the alibi herself. Crime drama, guest starring Salli Richardson-Whitfield (A Town Called Eureka)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: An internal security breach forces NCIS to go into lockdown when a covert listening device is found in a pen belonging to Secretary of the Navy Sarah Porter. DiNozzo discovers that National Security Agency analyst Ellie Bishop wrote a report two years previously predicting the possibility of such an occurrence and she is brought in to assist with the investigation and track down the culprit. Guest starring Leslie Hope and Emily Wickersham

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: US secretary of defence Wynn Crawford shuts down Gibbs' murder investigation and demands that agents McGee and Torres be arrested for their actions in the case. Mitch Pileggi guest stars

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: A successful auditor appears to have killed his family and then himself, but an analysis of the crime scene suggests a different scenario. When Goren and Eames learn the dead man uncovered a pensions scandal involving retired cops, the trail leads to corruption within the force

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: A magazine publisher is killed by a car bomb after he demands to meet a disabled girl he has been supporting. Goren and Eames begin to suspect the girl in question does not even exist and that her foster parents are running an elaborate fraud. Vincent D'Onofrio and Kathryn Erbe star

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A hail of gunfire tears through the crime lab, leading Mac and his former partner William Hunt to become embroiled in a 17-year-old vendetta. Crime drama, guest starring Peter Fonda

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A near-fatal experience prompts Mac to consider ending his career, but before he makes a decision he returns to his last unsolved case so he can be at peace with his ultimate choice. He reinvestigates a robbery that ended in a double murder in 2002, and tries to find the girl who disappeared after witnessing the crime. Drama, starring Gary Sinise

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A sound-system installer is murdered after supplying goods to a strip club covertly operated by the Mafia, and the finger of blame points to a small-time hoodlum whose crime boss father is serving life imprisonment. The case eventually comes to trial - but investigators are disturbed to hear an untrustworthy government attorney is handling the prosecution. Drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Steven Hill

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A pregnant student is found murdered, and detectives Briscoe and Curtis discover she was strangled to death before being stabbed by the killer in an effort to make the attack seem like the random act of a psychopath. A mathematics professor soon comes under suspicion as eyewitnesses allege he was close to the crime scene on the night in question

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis uncover new evidence as they investigate a 30-year-old rape and stabbing case, but the victim is consumed with fear when confronted with the possibility of another trial for the perpetrator

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the murder of an insurance salesman who sold bogus policies to European Jews during the Second World War and soon discover the victim possessed valuable information about specific policy numbers that could provide a link to the culprit. Jerry Reach and Jesse L Martin star

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Detectives Green and Briscoe search for a gigolo suspected of killing an elderly rich woman and stealing a large amount of her jewellery, but as investigations progress, it becomes clear there is more to the murder than meets the eye. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: An attorney is killed shortly after deciding to file a sexual harrassment claim against his employer, and when Briscoe and Curtis investigate further, they discover both the alleged harasser and his wife have excellent motives for murder

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team is called in to investigate when marine corporal Flegman is found shot to death, and a phone leads them to a hotel room where Gibbs awkwardly stumbles upon his ex-wife Diane Sterling and her FBI agent ex-husband TC Fornell. She had been attempting to call her boyfriend Eddie to break up with him, but somehow Flegman had taken possession of his phone. The team tracks down Eddie's car and discovers a clown nose along with traces of blood and he quickly becomes the prime suspect

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team investigates when a mysterious, fast-spreading illness strikes children from military families. While Gibbs tries to determine the cause, Abby and Jimmy partner with the Naval Medical Research Centre in the hope of delivering a cure before the holidays. Mark Harmon stars

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The murder of a port authority officer reveals Parsa's possible whereabouts as the team continues the hunt for the terrorist intent on wiping out NCIS. Bishop reveals her past association with the quarry and suggests where she thinks he may be found, but the CIA has intercepted a call that places Parsa in a different location to Ellie's hunch. Mark Harmon and Emily Wickersham star

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Eames and Goren's investigation into the murder of a pharmaceutical salesman found cut in half uncovers a web of corruption involving fraud, bribery, identity theft and a conspiracy to sell contaminated blood. Detective drama, starring Vincent D'Onofrio and Kathryn Erbe

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: A stockbroker discovers unsettling information about a company trading in land and water rights, and later becomes the prime suspect in the murder of her lover. However, evidence emerges that the crime is part of a scheme to manipulate share prices

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Goren and Eames' investigation into the murder of an undertaker leads them to discover a field of decomposed corpses. The detectives soon turn their attentions to the owner of a nearby crematorium and his shady relationship with a contract killer. Vincent D'Onofrio and Kathryn Erbe star

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The 10th anniversary of the September 11, 2001, terrorist attacks arrives, prompting the forensic investigators to recall what they were each doing on the day. Meanwhile, Mac is still on leave, and Jo has been placed in charge of the team investigating the murder of a bouncer who was shot when two men robbed the bar he was working at. Crime drama, starring Gary Sinise and Sela Ward

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac and the team investigate the murder of a college student, focusing their inquiry on his best friend, who has been printing counterfeit money - but evidence suggests another party may have been involved. Meanwhile, Jo feels anxious about meeting her son's new room-mate and Danny deals with additional strain on his marriage

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Nick and Hank investigate when a child goes missing, uncovering several similar cases all linked by sightings of a mysterious ghostly presence. It transpires that the Weeping Woman - or La Llorona - is a ghost who kidnaps three children every Halloween and drowns them, hoping their sacrifice can atone for the loss of her own children, whom she also drowned. David Giuntoli stars

programme.title: Secret Eaters
programme.desc: Anna Richardson brings another family to task for their eating habits. The White-Olivers want to review their diet for the sake of daughter Ellie. Mum Leanne is classified as obese, but has no idea where she is going wrong, while dad Craig, a former professional footballer, claims he does not eat too much. What will they say after being confronted with footage of their compulsive snacking? There is also an experiment to test the theory that dining in company makes people eat more

Linda Dykes heads to Wirksworth in Derbyshire with keen recruits Richard and Hayley to work their magic on a community-run swimming pool lacking the funds for a cleaner

programme.title: Body Cam
programme.desc: How a relationship break-up turned deadly and a minor traffic stop risked a child's life. Plus, how a killer on the run left a state trooper fighting for his life

programme.desc: Operations supervisor Gemma races to the scene of a life-threatening chainsaw accident. A woman is injured after falling on a hiking trail

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping Feature. Your one-stop-shop for all things cruise; bringing you the hottest destinations, ground-breaking ships and the latest deals to ensure your next cruise is your greatest one

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: The return of the programme in which famous faces compete in the cross-country bargain-hunting challenge. Hayley Mills and her friend and Wild at Heart co-star Stephen Tompkinson set out on a trip around north-east England in classic cars, receiving expert guidance from Christina Trevanion and David Harper as they visit antique shops and emporiums to find items to sell at an auction in West Yorkshire. Hayley detours to hear the little-known story behind Earl Grey tea and Stephen visits the home of a famous amateur football team

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Brookside veterans Ricky Tomlinson and Michael Starke embark on the cross-country treasure-hunting challenge, kicking off in Cheshire and heading for auction in Southport. They are joined by experts Catherine Southon and Margie Cooper, and gamble buys include antiques from Japan and China

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Celebrity friends Chesney Hawkes and Debbie McGee scour the south east in search of all things antique, accompanied by experts Christina Trevanion and Charles Hanson. Debbie hopes to conjure up a profit with a mantle clock and a hunting flask, while Chesney is taken by a 100-year-old weathervane

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Strictly Come Dancing 2016 champions Ore Oduba and Joanne Clifton swap the ballroom for the saleroom as they travel around Sussex and Kent in search of bargains, with the help of experts Catherine Southon and David Harper. Along the way, Ore learns how cricket has its origins in a game invented by milk maids 600 years ago, and Joanne finds out about vintage movie-making in Shoreham-by-Sea. But which of the duo will make the most profit when they go to auction in Southend?

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Accompanied by experts James Braxton and Raj Bisram, former Holby City actors Tina Hobley and Sharon Maughan traverse the Cotswold countryside in search of some classy antiques to sell at auction. Sharon breaks from the shops to learn about a troubled love life of one the country's greatest artists, while Tina finds out why the wealthy once raced their cars up a hill at break-neck speed

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: TV presenters Anthea Turner and Andi Peters join experts Charles Hanson and Margie Cooper on a quest to find items to sell at auction. Their search takes them through Cheshire, Greater Manchester and Staffordshire, with Margie allowing Andi to indulge his passion for aviation when he swaps their classic car for a vintage Vulcan bomber, while Anthea learns about Staffordshire's rich heritage and why the county is synonymous with pottery

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Call The Midwife co-stars Cliff Parisi and Judy Parfitt team up with regulars Catherine Southon and Phillip Serrell. Headed for an auction in Norfolk, they start their antiques hunt in Kent. Will Cliff's love for vintage toy cars secure the biggest profits or can Judy's tough bargaining skills see her triumph?

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Actresses Anna Chancellor and Holly Aird take to the antique shops of the Home Counties, ably assisted by experts Natasha Raskin Sharp and Margie Cooper. The thespian rivals come across antique lamps, glittering shoe buckles and Georgian underpants, and an eclectic collection of props ranging from a military field flask to a pigeon clock

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Veteran broadcasters John Sergeant and Peter White take a road trip through Surrey on a search for antiques, with expert help from James Braxton and Philip Serrell. Along the way, John takes to the river in a historic yacht and Peter - blind from birth - bats a good innings at one of the country's oldest cricket clubs

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Poet Pam Ayres and her friend and actor Geoffrey Whitehead join experts James Braxton and Kate Bliss on a quest to find items to sell at an auction in Cirencester, Gloucestershire. programme.desc: The discovery of a mystery bag finally reveals the truth behind an imposter's lies and deception. Drug readings spark an intensive search of a man's belongings, which results in an explosive reaction. A shipment of tennis racquets serves up a big hit for officers

programme.title: Nothing to Declare
programme.desc: Another edition of the fly-on-the-wall documentary accessing the world of national security at Australia's biggest airports, following customs and immigration officers as they go about their daily business of tackling drug runners, illegal immigrants and terrorists

programme.title: Border Patrol
programme.desc: Follow the work of the New Zealand Customs agents in their quest to prevent illegal items passing through the country's borders.

programme.title: Border Patrol
programme.desc: Immigration deal with a Singaporean national who claims to be meeting a mystery man. Plus, a flood in the biosecurity zone shuts down the airport

programme.title: Police Force: Australia
programme.desc: Documentary series following the work of police forces across Australia as they deal with situations from sieges and major drug busts, to murder investigations
