programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: O'Neill is knocked unconscious and replaced by an alien double while on a mission - leaving it up to his colleagues to notice the exchange before disaster strikes. Richard Dean Anderson stars

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Sheppard and the team visit a strange world whose desperate inhabitants have devoted all their energies to developing a drug intended to make them immune from the attacks of the Wraith

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: As Troi's mother sets out on a mission to find a man, she pays the crew a surprise visit - and makes a beeline for Picard. Majel Barrett guest stars, with Patrick Stewart

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Part two of two. The Federation attacks DS9 in hopes of keeping the mine field at the wormhole intact, while the Dominion waits entrance to the Alpha Quadrant from the other side. Avery Brooks stars

programme.title: Star Trek: Enterprise
programme.desc: When the Enterprise responds to a distress call from a Vulcan ship stranded in the Delphic Expanse, Archer and his boarding team are attacked by its zombie-like inhabitants

programme.title: Lost Girl
programme.desc: Kenzi performs a spiritual cleansing of a house and unwittingly brings home a vicious Fae spider with venom that can turn people psychotic

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: Melinda is contacted by the spirit of a woman whose death caused an estrangement between her husband and son, and begs the medium can reconcile the pair so that she can cross over. Supernatural drama, starring Jennifer Love Hewitt

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: Stand-up comedian Marty Golden commits suicide, but his restless spirit is left trapped between two worlds. Calling on Melinda to help him, he seeks to move on by making amends with those he left behind. Paranormal drama, guest starring Jed Rees, with Jennifer Love Hewitt

programme.title: Merlin
programme.desc: Gwen is mistaken for Morgana and kidnapped by savage outlaw Hengist, prompting Arthur to defy his father and race into enemy territory to her rescue. However, he finds she is not alone in the abductor's castle - Lancelot is already there. Fantasy drama, starring Angel Coulby, Bradley James and Santiago Cabrera

programme.title: Merlin
programme.desc: Part one of two. Uther becomes infatuated with the beautiful Lady Catrina, a newcomer to Camelot. However, Merlin realises she is really a troll hiding her true identity behind magic. As the young wizard fights to prove to the disbelieving Arthur that the woman is a monster, it becomes clear she is motivated by more than the prospect of winning the king's heart. Fantasy drama, guest starring Sarah Parish and Adam Godley

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: A paperboy finds the severed head of an undercover journalist who was reporting on Mexican drug gangs. Catherine investigates, and the trail leads to a band whose music glorifies narcotics-related murders - including one song that seems to describe the case in question. Meanwhile, Warrick and Brass deal with the shooting of a salesman

programme.title: Banged Up Abroad

programme.title: The Knowledge: The World's Toughest Taxi Test
programme.desc: A behind-the-scenes look at the test that all black cab drivers working in the city of London must take, one of the world's toughest exams - The Knowledge of London. Each candidate must memorise the capital's 25,000 streets, traffic restrictions and ever-changing points of interest, which takes an average of four years of determination to successfully pass

programme.title: Killing Hitler
programme.desc: Part one of two. A blend of documentary, dramatic reconstruction and expert military analysis brings to life the blueprint of Operation Foxley - a 1944 plan to assassinate Adolf Hitler. Featuring testimonies from operatives of Churchill's Special Operations Executive and one of the Fuehrer's most trusted bodyguards, the ethical right to kill an enemy head of state is debated during the unfolding story of LB/X - the man in charge of the plot to kill the Allies' most hated foe

programme.title: Anoop and The Elephant (1972)
programme.desc: Two English children meet an Indian boy and his pet elephant, and help to keep the animal out of the hands of a greedy circus owner. Family drama, with Anoop Singh and Phil Daniels

programme.title: The Kid From Canada (1958)
programme.desc: A boy visits his family in the Scottish Highlands, where his boastfulness gets him into trouble during a horse riding trip. Family drama, with Christopher Braden and Bernard Braden

programme.title: Greatest Miracles Easter Concert: Light the Way
programme.desc: The Tabernacle Choir sing classical greats in this series of special Easter performances of music and spoken word

programme.title: All Coppers Are (1971)
programme.desc: A young policeman and a small-time crook are both involved with the same girl. Drama, starring Martin Potter, Julia Foster and David Essex

programme.title: A Stitch in Time (1963)
programme.desc: A butcher's bumbling assistant causes no end of accidents at work, the latest of which has landed his boss in hospital. While visiting, he meets a little girl who has not spoken since her parents died, and resolves to put a smile on the orphan's face. Slapstick comedy, starring Norman Wisdom, Edward Chapman, Jerry Desmonde, Lucy Appleby and Jill Melford

programme.title: Brief Encounter (1974)
programme.desc: Two married strangers meet by chance in a railway station waiting room, and their paths later cross many times until the pair become friends and their meetings a fixed arrangement. But as their feelings for each other transform from friendship into passion, both come to realise the affair is doomed to fail. Remake of David Lean's 1948 classic, starring Richard Burton and Sophia Loren

programme.title: Passport to Pimlico (1949)
programme.desc: The residents of a London suburb discover documents proving their neighbourhood is not part of Britain, and declare independence. Appointing their own head of state, they begin erecting borders as the government resorts to desperate measures to bring the community back under British rule. Ealing comedy, starring Stanley Holloway and Margaret Rutherford

programme.title: Charlton Heston Presents the Bible
programme.desc: The renowned actor serves as storyteller an ancient Roman amphitheatre and other locales in Israel provide the settings, bringing the King James text to life

programme.title: My Greek Odyssey
programme.desc: Peter Maneas embarks on a journey through some of the most spectacular and unique Greek islands, exploring the rich culture, history and food of Greece while meeting the locals and those who live there

programme.title: Next Big Thing
programme.desc: International Arts Judge James Nicholls is searching for emerging painters, sculptors, photographers and street artists to help them develop

programme.title: Hardware
programme.desc: Enticed by the prospect of a big boost to his wages, Mike applies for a job at the detested DIY superstore, while back at Hamway's Hardware, the lads try to entice more women through the door by 'feminising' the premises _ much to the consternation of regular male customers

programme.title: The Exception (2016)
programme.desc: A German soldier tries to determine if the Dutch resistance has planted a spy to infiltrate the home of Kaiser Wilhelm in Holland during the onset of the Second World War, but falls for a young Jewish-Dutch woman during his investigation. Drama, starring Lily James, Jai Courtney and Christopher Plummer

programme.title: Operation Chromite (2016)
programme.desc: A squad of South Korean soldiers sent to infiltrate their northern neighbours during the crucial Battle of Incheon. Wartime drama, starring Lee Jung-jae and Liam Neeson

programme.title: The Hatton Garden Job (2017)
programme.desc: A ragtag group of career criminals plot an audacious, multi-million-pound raid on an underground facility in London. True-life crime drama, with Stephen Moyer, Larry Lamb and Matthew Goode

programme.title: Eugenie De Sade (1973)
programme.desc: A teenage girl lives alone with her stepfather after the death of her mother, and becomes fascinated with the dark erotic stories he writes. As she grows more and more sexually obsessed with him and his tales, she fails to realise the dangerous secrets that have inspired his creations. Erotic thriller, starring Soledad Miranda and Paul Muller

programme.title: The Comic Strip Presents
programme.desc: Two inept hitmen pursue a banker who has embezzled from the Mafia through the streets of London - but have no clue what to do with him when they catch him

programme.title: Greatest Miracles Easter Concert: Light the Way
programme.desc: The Tabernacle Choir sing classical greats in this series of special Easter performances of music and spoken word

programme.title: Dork Hunters from Outer Space
programme.desc: A group of heroes try to stop aliens taking over the universe

programme.title: K3
programme.desc: The girls go on a cruise where single people look for love, and help one of their fellow passengers win the heart of a famous actress

programme.title: K3
programme.desc: The girls perform at a princess's coronation ceremony, only to be accused of stealing an ancient jewel

programme.title: Heidi
programme.desc: Follow sweet and innocent mountain girl Heidi as she discovers life's ups and downs. She lights up and soothes the people and animals all around her, with her enthusiastic, generous and wonderful zest for life

programme.title: Kong: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Animated fantasy adventures

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: Halvar receives a message in a bottle containing a plea for help from a damsel in distress, and Vic realises the ship is infested with woodworm

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: The crew is kidnapped by a tribe of British warrior women, who force Halvar to prove he is innocent of plundering their kingdom by undertaking four challenges

programme.title: Discover London
programme.desc: Explore hidden gems and alternative areas of the capital, learning more about the cultural history of one of the world's greatest cities

programme.title: George and Mildred: The Movie (1980)
programme.desc: The mismatched suburban couple go on a weekend holiday in London to celebrate their wedding anniversary, only for gangsters to mistake George for a hired killer. Spin-off from the sitcom, starring Yootha Joyce, Brian Murphy and Stratford Johns

programme.title: Dentist on the Job (1961)
programme.desc: Two newly qualified dentists unwittingly get involved in the invention and promotion of a new toothpaste. Comedy, starring Bob Monkhouse, Ronnie Stevens, Kenneth Connor, Shirley Eaton, Eric Barker, Richard Wattis and Charles Hawtrey

programme.title: Greatest Miracles Easter Concert: Light the Way
programme.desc: The Tabernacle Choir sing classical greats in this series of special Easter performances of music and spoken word

programme.title: Danger Man
programme.desc: John Drake (Patrick McGoohan), a secret agent working for NATO, travels to different corners of the world in order to prevent crimes that threaten world peace

programme.title: The Ronnie Wood Show
programme.desc: Booker T & the MGs guitarist Steve Cropper, who has worked with artists including Wilson Pickett, Otis Redding and Sam & Dave, talks to Ronnie about his lengthy and colourful career. The pair also discuss the records they both admire

programme.title: Inside Claridge's
programme.desc: Thirty delegations from around the world arrive to stay at the hotel for the duration of the Olympics, with the red carpet being rolled out five times a day for heads of state. World-famous Danish eatery Noma sets up a pop-up restaurant in the ballroom and Claridge's chefs are faced with providing Nordic-foraged food to thousands of guests who have paid £195 each. A couple fly in from Atlanta for the wedding of their dreams and a butler prepares a suite for one of the hotel's most valued guests, bringing furniture, hat boxes and 20 suits out of storage for just one night

programme.title: My Greek Odyssey
programme.desc: Peter Maneas embarks on a journey through some of the most spectacular and unique Greek islands, exploring the rich culture, history and food of Greece while meeting the locals and those who live there

programme.title: The Food Inspectors
programme.desc: Matt Allwright and Chris Hollins follow the work of food inspectors, who protect the public from unhygienic restaurants and potentially harmful foodstuffs. In the first edition, they investigate the problem of counterfeit bottles of alcohol, which are often dangerously strong, and members of an unsuspecting family have their mealtime assessed to see whether their cooking poses any health risks. The team also examines one of the most harmful bacteria

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Tracey makes an appointment with a Harley Street specialist, hoping to allay her suspicions that she may be pregnant. Comedy, starring Pauline Quirke, Linda Robson and Lesley Joseph

programme.title: Underworld at War
programme.desc: Peter Williams investigates the scandal, theft and murder that flourished in the South East during the Second World War, as black market traders and criminals took advantage of Blitz conditions to make an easy living while their compatriots were risking life and limb in defence of the realm

programme.title: Underworld at War
programme.desc: Peter Williams tells the contrasting stories of people responding to the traumas of the Second World War. While Kent student Daphne Baker set her heart on becoming a head teacher as her contribution to the war effort, conman Neville Heath embarked on a fraudulent spree preying on vulnerable women

programme.title: Ladies That Punch
programme.desc: Documentary about the Ladies Boxing Association, whose members come from all walks of life, from catwalk models to IT workers

programme.title: Escape from Sobibor (1987)
programme.desc: New arrivals at a Nazi concentration camp realise they do not have long to live as the Nazi campaign of genocide gathers speed. The commandant threatens to execute one prisoner for every escape attempt - leading the inmates to realise that the only hope is for all 600 of them to break out together. Drama based on the true story of the largest uprising during the Holocaust, starring Alan Arkin, Joanna Pacula and Rutger Hauer

programme.title: Jailhouse Wardress (1981)
programme.desc: A female Nazi prison warden goes into hiding in South America after the Second World War. She oversees a secret facility where genetically engineered sex slaves are created for her fellow war criminals, while also plotting revenge for the Third Reich's defeat. Drama, starring Monica Swinn and Michael Bates

programme.title: Born Ready
programme.desc: After the death of Rebecca's father life has been very hard. Fed up of struggling Rebecca and her best friend make some risky decisions in a hope to change both of their current financial situations

programme.title: All Coppers Are (1971)
programme.desc: A young policeman and a small-time crook are both involved with the same girl. Drama, starring Martin Potter, Julia Foster and David Essex

programme.title: The Kid From Canada (1958)
programme.desc: A boy visits his family in the Scottish Highlands, where his boastfulness gets him into trouble during a horse riding trip. Family drama, with Christopher Braden and Bernard Braden

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours exploring and revealing lesser known areas of London for locals and tourists. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay

programme.title: Dork Hunters from Outer Space
programme.desc: A group of heroes try to stop aliens taking over the universe

programme.title: K3
programme.desc: The band performs in an underwater base, only to discover that anyone who spends too long down there starts to go mad

programme.title: K3
programme.desc: Kylie suffers a knock on the head while stranded in the jungle which leaves her convinced she is a monkey

programme.title: Heidi
programme.desc: Follow Heidi as she discovers life's ups and downs. She lights up and soothes the people and animals all around her, with her enthusiastic, generous and wonderful zest for life

programme.title: Kong: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Animated fantasy adventures

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: Halvar and his crew throws all the food overboard to appease a monster they think is chasing them - but then have to go ashore in dangerous territory to find more

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: A band of Welsh druids threatens to shave off Halvar's beard as an offering to the gods, but a game of dominoes may hold the key to defeating them

programme.title: Dork Hunters from Outer Space
programme.desc: A group of heroes try to stop aliens taking over the universe

programme.title: Clipper: Race of Their Lives
programme.desc: Behind the scenes on the record-breaking 40,000 nautical mile race around the world on 70-foot ocean racing yachts. Follow the inside story of what they go through to take part

programme.title: My Greek Odyssey
programme.desc: Peter Maneas embarks on a journey through some of the most spectacular and unique Greek islands, exploring the rich culture, history and food of Greece while meeting the locals and those who live there

programme.title: Best of The Tube
programme.desc: Recapping the finest moments from the music show that was hosted by Jools Holland and the late Paula Yates

programme.title: The Ronnie Wood Show
programme.desc: Booker T & the MGs guitarist Steve Cropper, who has worked with artists including Wilson Pickett, Otis Redding and Sam & Dave, talks to Ronnie about his lengthy and colourful career. The pair also discuss the records they both admire

programme.title: The Food Hospital
programme.desc: The consultants explain how changes in diet could help a 19-year-old dancer deal with Crohn's disease and boost the fertility of a man desperate to become a father. They also help a teenager redefine her relationship with food following gastric bypass surgery. Pixie McKenna examines the effectiveness of energy drinks, and a nationwide survey contributes to research into a natural remedy for insomnia

programme.title: Passport to Pimlico (1949)
programme.desc: The residents of a London suburb discover documents proving their neighbourhood is not part of Britain, and declare independence. Appointing their own head of state, they begin erecting borders as the government resorts to desperate measures to bring the community back under British rule. Ealing comedy, starring Stanley Holloway and Margaret Rutherford

programme.title: A Stitch in Time (1963)
programme.desc: A butcher's bumbling assistant causes no end of accidents at work, the latest of which has landed his boss in hospital. While visiting, he meets a little girl who has not spoken since her parents died, and resolves to put a smile on the orphan's face. Slapstick comedy, starring Norman Wisdom, Edward Chapman, Jerry Desmonde, Lucy Appleby and Jill Melford

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours exploring and revealing lesser known areas of London for locals and tourists. Featuring Woolwich, Deptford and Lewisham. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay

programme.title: Sapphire and Steel
programme.desc: Part seven of eight. The agents find they have travelled 12 days into the future, in which time the ghosts have vanished and Tully has made a dangerous bargain

programme.title: The Ronnie Wood Show
programme.desc: The guitarist talks to his current Faces bandmate Mick Hucknall. The duo perform a version of Bob Dylan's One of Us Must Know, and Ronnie shares his memories of Jimi Hendrix

programme.title: Dispatches
programme.desc: Documentary investigating allegations that a lack of proper controls is allowing financial, physical and even sexual abuse to take place within Britain's mosques. Over a year in the making, this programme exposes how worshippers' generosity can be exploited by religious leaders and how extreme groups can assume control of a community

programme.title: Sapphire and Steel
programme.desc: Part eight of eight. Sapphire makes contact with the Darkness, while Steel tries to make a deal to return the agents to their own time

programme.title: Danger Man
programme.desc: John Drake (Patrick McGoohan), a secret agent working for NATO, travels to different corners of the world in order to prevent crimes that threaten world peace

programme.title: After You've Gone
programme.desc: Sitcom written by My Family creator Fred Barron, starring Nicholas Lyndhurst of only Only Fools and Horses fame as divorcee Jimmy Venables, whose ex-wife leaves to work as a nurse in Africa. He soon finds his efforts to raise his children - Molly, a girl who thinks she's a woman, and Alex, a boy who dresses like one - hindered by mother-in-law Diana, who takes it on herself to move in to the family home. Also in the cast are Celia Imrie and Dani Harmer

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours narrated by Dewyne Lindsay, this time exploring Canary Wharf and Southbank.

programme.title: The Panama Papers
programme.desc: Some of the world's most notorious regimes face sanctions to stop them doing business. Simon Cox reveals how secretive shell companies allow them to continue moving money around

programme.title: Strippers vs Werewolves (2012)
programme.desc: Lapdancer Justice kills a customer when he undergoes a terrifying transformation, and the body is quietly disposed of. The dead man was a werewolf, and at the next full moon, the other members of his pack plan to seek revenge. Justice and her fellow strippers have one month to prepare themselves for a battle to the death. Comedy horror, starring Adele Silva and Robert Englund

programme.title: Operation Chromite (2016)
programme.desc: A squad of South Korean soldiers sent to infiltrate their northern neighbours during the crucial Battle of Incheon. Wartime drama, starring Lee Jung-jae and Liam Neeson

programme.title: Stella Street
programme.desc: Mick decides to dedicate his life to religion, while Joe receives decorating advice from Roger Moore. Comedy, written and performed by John Sessions and Phil Cornwell

programme.title: The Ronnie Wood Show
programme.desc: The guitarist talks to his current Faces bandmate Mick Hucknall. The duo perform a version of Bob Dylan's One of Us Must Know, and Ronnie shares his memories of Jimi Hendrix

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Documentary exploring areas of the capital, beginning with Shooters Hill, Charlton, Greenwich and Blackheath.

programme.title: Black Island (1978)
programme.desc: Two boys become separated from the rest of their class while on a trip to a small island - and end up getting captured by a gang of armed criminals. Adventure, starring Michael Elphick, Martin Murphy and Michael Salmon

programme.title: Clipper: Race of Their Lives
programme.desc: Behind the scenes on the record-breaking 40,000 nautical mile race around the world on 70-foot ocean racing yachts. Follow the inside story of what they go through to take part

programme.title: Worlds Apart with Oksana Boyko
programme.desc: Worlds Apart is a fast-paced, in-depth discussion on the pressing issues of the day. The host Oksana Boyko strives to depart from the traditional Q-and-A form of interview in favor of an emotive and engaging conversation. While the title and format of the program presuppose differences of opinion, WA's main goal is to facilitate public debate in an intelligent and respectful manner

programme.title: World Club Series Rugby League Highlights
programme.desc: Leeds Rhinos v North Queensland Cowboys. Action from the World Club Challenge at Headingley, as the Super League champions and NRL winners went head to head in the final match of the series. The Rhinos completed the historic treble of Challenge Cup, League Leaders' Shield and Super League title last season, but began this campaign without three of their most experienced players. Jamie Peacock and Kylie Leuluai have both now retired, while captain Kevin Sinfield has jumped codes to join Yorkshire Carnegie in rugby union. Brian McDermott's side also made a less-than-ideal start to the defence of their Super League crown, losing their opening game against Warrington Wolves 12-10 on this ground

programme.title: EFL Highlights
programme.desc: Crystal Palace v Watford. Action from the 2012/13 Championship play-off final at Wembley Stadium, as the teams contested a place in the top flight alongside the already promoted Cardiff City and Hull City. Palace reached this match when Wilfried Zaha scored a brace in a 2-0 away win against Brighton & Hove Albion after a goalless draw in the first leg. Meanwhile, Watford bounced back from narrowly missing out on automatic promotion by overcoming Leicester City in dramatic fashion, with Troy Deeney scoring an injury time-winner on the counter after Manuel Almunia had saved a penalty

programme.title: EFL Highlights
programme.desc: Brentford v Yeovil Town. Action from the 2012/13 League One play-off final at Wembley Stadium, where the remaining place in the following season's Championship was decided. Brentford agonisingly missed out on automatic promotion on the final day of the regular campaign, but recovered to defeat Swindon Town on penalties in their semi-final, while Yeovil were 2-1 aggregate victors over Sheffield United

programme.title: EFL Highlights
programme.desc: Bradford City v Northampton Town. Action from the 2012/13 League Two play-off final at Wembley Stadium, where promotion to League One awaited the winners. The Bantams were making their second appearance of the season at Wembley having also reached the League Cup final following an outstanding giant-killing run, and they needed to come from behind to edge out Burton Albion to reach this stage. The Cobblers ended a run of recent poor form to win 1-0 in both legs of their semi-final against Cheltenham Town to move within one match of reaching the third tier of English football

programme.desc: Wolverhampton Wanderers v West Ham United (Kick-off 8.00pm). Coverage of the top-flight clash from Molineux, as both teams battle for three important points. programme.title: Live MNF
programme.desc: Wolverhampton Wanderers v West Ham United (Kick-off 8.00pm). Coverage of the top-flight clash from Molineux, as both teams battle for three important points. The Hammers' 4-0 victory at the London Stadium back in September ended a run of four consecutive defeats against their hosts. Two Jarrod Bowen goals alongside a Raul Jiminez own goal and a 90th minute header from Sebastien Haller were enough to end David Moyes' sides poor recent run against the Midlands side.
